diagrams.description: Organizational Psychology is the scientific study of human behavior in the workplace. This flowchart outlines the process: its ultimate goal is to enhance individual, group, and organizational effectiveness. It integrates core levels of analysis (individual, group, organizational) with foundational theories (goal setting, expectancy, equity, job characteristics, person‑job fit) and rigorous methods (surveys, experiments, big data analytics). The applied process involves assessment, diagnosis, intervention, and evaluation, leading to outcomes such as improved performance, employee well‑being, and organizational productivity.
